description_long: This house features a steeply pitched thatched roof with a natural, textured appearance, extending well beyond the whitewashed walls. The facade is adorned with small, blue-trimmed windows and a central arched doorway, while the base of the house is bordered by a dark trim. The gable ends are painted a muted red and include small attic windows, with one side showing a small overhang above the entry. The thatched roof is thick and uneven, giving the house a rustic, traditional look. The overall structure is compact and single-storied, with a simple, functional design typical of rural European cottages.
description: A rustic, single-story house with a steep thatched roof, whitewashed walls, blue-trimmed windows, and red-painted gable ends. The central arched doorway and small attic windows add to its traditional, rural charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thatched roof, central arched doorway, two blue-trimmed windows, and a small porch area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep roof pitch, red-painted gable, small attic window, and a single window on the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with the thatched roof, a small attic window in the gable, and a single door below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red-painted gable, two blue-trimmed windows, and the thick thatched roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with a small porch, blue trim, and no steps or columns
